title: The Earth Planetary Council
summary: The planetary authority — the 'Morphogenic Hierarchy' — that rules on who may leave Earth.
markdown:
The **Earth Planetary Council** — also called the **Morphogenic Hierarchy of this Planet** —
is the authority that governs incarnation on Earth in the archive's cosmology. It appears most
directly in the July 8, 2020 session, where it hears the petition of
[Ori, the stranded chrononaut](/lore/ori/).

The Council's doctrine, as the sessions present it: a consciousness incarnated on Earth is
bound to the planet's morphogenetic field and its [life contract](/lore/reincarnation/), and
may not simply be extracted. Ori's request to leave is first **denied** — she must live out
the incarnation — and only later is an exception granted: extraction *at the end of her natural
life*, into a cloned body, with a new ship and post.

The Earth Planetary Council fills a distinctive niche among the archive's many councils: not a
galactic government like the [Interstellar Alliance](/lore/interstellar-alliance/), but the
local law of embodiment itself — the authority that makes being human, in the sessions'
terms, a commitment that even time-travelers cannot break.
